title: Civil News: Legal Aid opportunities in Housing and Debt
body: "The Legal Aid Agency is seeking to identify additional providers in the Housing, Debt and Welfare Benefits Categories of Law in the following areas:   Barnsley Calderdale Cheshire City of Kingston upon Hull Doncaster East Riding of Yorkshire Hartlepool Knowsley Leicestershire & Rutland North East Lincolnshire & North Lincolnshire Northumberland Rochdale Rotherham Sandwell Trafford Warrington & Halton West Lancashire Wigan   The Civil Re-opening: 2024 Standard Civil Contract Procurement Process will remain open during the term of the 2024 Contract so that new entrants can apply for a contract at any time.  Tenders can be submitted across all Categories of Law and the procurement will remain open during the term of the 2024 Contract so that new entrants can apply for a contract at any time. The LAA intends to award contracts under this process to commence as soon as possible after the verification process is complete.  This provides a more flexible approach removing hard deadlines. It also supports our commitments to doing all we can to enable suitably qualified providers to offer legal aid funded services.  Where can I find out more?  Please see Category Specific Rules:   2024 Housing and Debt Category Specific Rules  (PDF, 176 KB, 17 pages)  Further information  Re-opening: 2024 Standard Civil Contract Procurement Process - GOV.UK "
